nasb.text: But Ishmael the son of Nethaniah escaped from Johanan with eight men and went to the sons of Ammon.

esv.text: But Ishmael the son of Nethaniah escaped from Johanan with eight men, and went to the Ammonites.

cnv.text: 尼探雅的兒子以實瑪利帶著八個人逃脫了約哈難的手，到亞捫那裡去。

ccb.text: 尼探雅的儿子以实玛利带着八个人逃脱约哈难的追击，前往亚扪。
